raw_title: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_en: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_zh: 人工智能时代的新闻认知权威：生成式人工智能在新闻编辑室的融入
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在人工智能时代，新闻机构如何保持其作为可信信息来源的权威地位。它特别关注生成式人工智能（如能自动生成文本的AI工具）被引入新闻编辑室后，对新闻工作方式和公众信任的影响。研究可能分析新闻工作者如何适应这些新技术，以及AI工具是否改变了新闻生产的流程和质量标准。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how news organizations maintain their authority as trusted sources of information in the age of artificial intelligence. It focuses specifically on the impact of generative AI (tools that can automatically create text) being introduced into newsrooms, affecting how journalism is done and public trust. The study likely analyzes how journalists adapt to these new technologies and whether AI tools change the processes and quality standards of news production.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于数字新闻学领域，探索人工智能技术对新闻业核心功能——如信息验证、报道可信度和编辑决策——的变革性影响。它旨在理解新闻机构在技术快速演进中如何重新定义其社会角色和认知权威。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the field of digital journalism, exploring the transformative impact of AI technologies on core functions of journalism, such as information verification, reporting credibility, and editorial decision-making. It aims to understand how news organizations redefine their social roles and epistemic authority amid rapid technological evolution.
